business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number WC-KCB-2025-5580; Form WC 00 00 04; Experience Modification Factor 0.86; Premium is estimated and subject to final audit

coverages_discussed.coverage_type: Workers' Compensation — EL Disease Each Employee

positives: Experience Modification Factor of 0.86, indicating better-than-average historical loss experience relative to industry peers
Waiver of Subrogation endorsement in place (WC 00 03 13)
Alternate Employer Endorsement included for leased/assigned employees (WC 00 03 01 A)
All States Endorsement provides broad geographic coverage (WC 00 03 03)
Terrorism Risk Insurance Act coverage included (WC 00 04 06)
concerns: Multiple high-hazard construction classifications including Carpentry NOC (code 5403, rate 8.24), Masonry NOC (code 5022, rate 9.15), and Plumbing NOC (code 5183, rate 4.52)
Masonry classification (5022) carries a 'G' governmental designation
Large total estimated annual remuneration base across seven classifications indicating significant workforce exposure
Construction industry inherently carries elevated workers' compensation injury risk

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Workers Compensation and Employers Liability Insurance Policy issued by Hallmark Insurance Group to Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. Policy Number WC-KCB-2025-5580 covering the period 08/01/2025 to 08/01/2026. Total estimated premium of $1,158,173.43. Employers Liability limits of $1,000,000 each accident / $1,000,000 disease policy / $1,000,000 disease each employee. Experience Modification Factor: 0.86.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code 1521 — General contracting for commercial and institutional construction including healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Classification schedule includes: Carpentry NOC (5403) — Est. Remuneration $5,915,000, Rate 8.24; Electrical Wiring (5190) — Est. Remuneration $4,544,000, Rate 4.86; Plumbing NOC (5183) — Est. Remuneration $3,075,000, Rate 4.52; Masonry NOC (5022) — Est. Remuneration $6,635,850, Rate 9.15 (Gov: G); Painting Interior (5474) — Est. Remuneration $1,639,000, Rate 6.92; Contractors Project Manager/Superintendent (5606) — Est. Remuneration $4,776,000, Rate 2.45; Clerical Office Employees NOC (8810) — Est. Remuneration $5,010,000, Rate 0.19.
